description: Upgraded Vite to ^8.0.1, @vitejs/plugin-react to ^6.0.1, Tailwind to ^4.2.2, @tailwindcss/vite to ^4.2.2, jsPDF to ^4.2.1, nodemailer to ^8.0.3, @types/react to ^19.2.14, @types/react-dom to ^19.2.3. Removed postcss and autoprefixer (redundant with Tailwind v4 Vite plugin). Pinned Node.js to 24.14.0 LTS in netlify.toml and package.json engines. Updated contact email to ameristarschool@yahoo.com and added second phone number (310) 377-0337. Fixed About.tsx typo. Fixed both phone numbers to have independent tel: links.
